history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair and a neutral expression leans out of an open window. He's wearing a light beige t-shirt with a silver chain necklace and plaid green and black shorts. His left arm rests on the windowsill, and his right arm is bent with his hand on the sill, revealing a silver watch on his left wrist and a ring on his right ring finger.

To his left is a weathered, faded green wooden louvered door with four rectangular panes at the top, one of which is slightly ajar. The door appears old and has visible wear and tear, with dust accumulated in the louvers. To his right are white louvered shutters, also appearing aged.

The background shows a dimly lit interior with vertical white paneling above the window frame. The overall lighting is soft and atmospheric, suggesting it might be dusk or evening. The color palette is dominated by muted greens, beiges, and whites, with the dark hair and plaid shorts providing a touch of contrast. The mood of the image is contemplative and slightly nostalgic, with a hint of urban decay due to the textures and worn appearance of the window and door. The shot is framed from a slightly low angle, looking up at the man.
